findings.description: `AuthenticationFailedException` is a PascalCase exception class name that appears explicitly in the source (PasswordAuthenticator example stack trace: `nablarch.common.authentication.AuthenticationFailedException`) but is absent from the s3 hints array.

`UPDATED_USER_ID` is one of the three data-linkage column names listed in the source table (カラム名 column: INSERT_REQUEST_ID, INSERT_EXECUTION_ID, UPDATED_USER_ID). The first two are included in hints but UPDATED_USER_ID is omitted, creating an inconsistency.
findings.source_evidence: ユーザID | UPDATED_USER_ID  (source table row, also present in the example log output: UPDATED_USER_ID=batch_user)
